channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Shops dumping rubbish by public bins, 17th April
item.description:
It seems that several businesses are using public bins. The situation is exacerbated during windy weather.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop flag in Lennard Rd Penge, 10m SE of the Newlands Park junction, south / westbound - no 75 timetable to Croydon on display., 16th April
item.description:
Bus stop flag in Lennard Rd Penge, 10m SE of the Newlands Park junction, south / westbound - no 75 timetable to Croydon on display. This is either missing or slipped down behind the other timetable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 66, Lennard Rd, Penge - Holy Trinity Church - Wheely bin being left on public footway instead of within the church curtilage., 16th April
item.description:
66, Lennard Rd, Penge - Holy Trinity Church - Wheely bin being left on public footway instead of within the church curtilage. Seen 15th and 16th April 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction waste dumped on road, 16th April
item.description:

item.title: Sunken manhole cover, 16th April
item.description:
Sunken double sized manhole cover in the carriageway which makes a banging sound when driven over. Located on Southwark Bridge, what3words location ///slip.shack.acute

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Street Place, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Illuminated sign STILL out, 16th April
item.description:
Ref 8432389 Sign light about two way traffic sign is still out. You closed the old report and I can’t reopen it so this is a re log Sign P1762 Light above two way traffic sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
